meta.title: GEONYX | Architectural Zone – Designer Mineral Surfaces and Façade Solutions
meta.description: GEONYX Architectural Zone offers high-durability mineral coatings and surfaces for public spaces, retail, façades and modern architecture. Seamless systems with high aesthetics, mechanical resistance and long service life.

hero.description: Engineering portal for architects and designers.
hero.descriptionLine2: Textures, CAD details and specifications for public procurement.

textures.title: VISUAL AND TACTILE CLASSIFICATION
textures.description: GEONYX surfaces are classified according to Light Reflectance Value (LRV) and Surface Roughness index. From deep matte coatings (Deep Matte) for light absorption to satin finishes. We provide textures corresponding to the real physical properties of the material.

monolith.title: STRUCTURAL CONTINUITY
monolith.description: GEONYX technology allows application over large areas without expansion joints (Seamless Application). This ensures hygienic cleanliness and eliminates the grid of grout lines typical of tiles. A single, continuous mineral surface from wall to wall.

assets3d.title: PBR MAPS FOR V-RAY / CORONA / BIM
assets3d.description: Digitised surfaces via 8K scanning. The full package includes physically accurate maps: Diffuse, Reflection, Glossiness, Normal and Displacement. Ready-to-use materials for integration into your BIM and CAD visualisations before execution.

documentation.title: TECHNICAL DOCUMENTATION
documentation.subtitle: SYSTEM PASSPORTS AND DECLARATIONS OF PERFORMANCE (DoP)

detailA.title: DETAIL A: WALL-FLOOR
detailA.desc: Detail for hygienic cove and wall connection.

detailB.title: DETAIL B: DRAINAGE
detailB.desc: Detail for connection with linear drains and point drainage.

detailC.title: DETAIL C: JOINTS AND CRACKS
detailC.desc: Detail for treatment of expansion joints and cracks.

tender.title: BILL OF QUANTITIES TEXTS (TENDER SPECS)
tender.subtitle: READY SPECIFICATIONS FOR PUBLIC PROCUREMENT AND TENDERS
tender.text: Supply and installation of high-durability mineral flooring type GEONYX®, thickness 6–9 mm. Compressive strength >110 N/mm² in accordance with EN 13892-2. Wear resistance <1.5 cm³/50cm² in accordance with DIN 52108 (Böhme). Fire classification A1fl. The product must hold CE marking and DoP declaration...
